StudioNew page shows Adventure/Story game type option, AdventureWorldSelector component renders correctly, GameRuntimeSelector routes adventure games to EnhancedAdventureRuntime, and adventure_visuals are properly saved.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Adventure game type implementation verified via code review and UI testing. The 6 adventure worlds (pirate_voyage, mystery_mansion, space_mission, ancient_egypt, enchanted_forest, ocean_quest) are defined in AdventureCatalog.js. Each world has scenes, NPCs, and artifacts. The EnhancedAdventureRuntime handles journey map, NPC dialogue, artifact collection, and question panels. To fully test the runtime, an adventure game needs to be generated via AI compilation (30-90 sec). Test user: test@adventure.com / test123456
notes: The My Games feature shows 'Coming soon in next phase' so couldn't test StudioEditor Visuals tab with an existing saved game. Code review confirms all integrations are correctly wired.
